title: melampyrum roseum var. obtusifolium
intro: Melampyrum roseum var. obtusifolium, also known as bitter wintergreen, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. Bitter wintergreen can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues, as well as promote overall health and well-being.
